name: vibe-rig
description: Requirement planning and Symphony execution prep for VibeRig workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Turn requirements into Symphony-ready execution plans.
interface.longDescription: VibeRig helps Codex turn ambiguous requirements into reviewable requirement docs, acceptance criteria, task graphs, Linear child issues, worktree execution plans for Symphony, and post-acceptance retrospectives with conservative learning candidates.
defaultPrompt: Split this spec into child tasks
